title: Section 6
content: If, for any reason, any vacancy occurs in the office of the Chairman or 1 [the member] of a Tribunal, the Central Government may fill the vacancy by appointing any person who fulfils the qualifications specified in sub-section (2) of section 5, as the Chairman, or, as the case may be, member of such Tribunal.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 3, ibid., for "any other member" (w.e.f. 25-4-1988).
